title: Introducing yourself
explanation:
Introducing yourself

Listen to the audio. You will hear people meeting for the first time.

Transcript

Anna: Hi! My name is Anna. What's your name?
Tom: Hello. I'm Tom. Nice to meet you.
Anna: Nice to meet you too. Where are you from?
Tom: I'm from London. And you?
Anna: I'm from Madrid.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.feedback: Tom says he is from London.
Anna says she is from Madrid.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Tom says: '____ to meet you.' | *Nice | Good | Fine
Anna asks: 'Where are you ____?' | *from | live | go
Anna's first question is: 'What's your ____?' | *name | from | meet
They say ____ to each other at the start. | *Hello | Goodbye | Thanks

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Tom asks Anna where she is from [*after|before|never] she asks him.

questions.feedback: They say nice to meet you.
